abilities.name: Spreading Blaze
abilities.rawDescription: After each Basic Attack: deal Physical Damage to one enemy in the same lane (Damage Rate +50%). Additionally, 20% chance to grant one Spreading Blaze stack to one ally that deals Tactical Damage. Repeat this chance once if any enemy deals Fire Damage.

notes: Mitigated by target Instinct
Double-Strike can potentially create another after-Basic-Attack trigger.

condition.description: At least one enemy deals Fire Damage.
condition.subject: enemy

repeat.description: Repeat the Spreading Blaze stack chance once if any enemy deals Fire Damage.

abilities.name: Warrior's Zeal
abilities.rawDescription: At Level 16+ and deployed in Vanguard, increase Vermax Physical Damage Dealt by 16%. Increase Instinct and Initiative of Left Flank ally by +20.

notes: Combat-log observation confirms this applies to Vermax Basic Attack Physical Damage.
Unqualified Physical Damage Dealt modifiers apply to all qualifying Physical Damage sources unless explicitly restricted.

abilities.name: Trial by Flame
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Each Round: reduce Fire Damage Received for allies below strict Troop Capacity thresholds until end of current round.

notes: Resistance reduces Damage Received.

unresolvedQuestions: Threshold semantics are strict below, not equal.

abilities.name: Reactive Instincts
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat: increase Instinct and Initiative of ally with highest Instinct, enhanced by Strength.

references.description: Initiative applies to the same highest-Instinct ally selected for Instinct.

abilities.name: Rallying Flame
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat: gain Rallying Flame and grant Spreading Blaze, repeating once for each enemy that deals Fire Damage.

repeat.description: Repeat once for each enemy that deals Fire Damage.

unresolvedQuestions: Target selection for multiple successful Spreading Blaze attempts.

abilities.name: Dragon's Valor
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Combat: reduce self Damage Received and increase Strength until end of combat.

abilities.name: Unyielding Resolve
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Each Round: chance to grant Advantage +15% for two rounds. If afflicted with Weakend, chance is multiplied by 1.5 and successful activation removes Weakened.

conditionalMultipliers.description: If Vermax is afflicted with Weakened, multiply trigger chance by 1.5.

notes: Successful conditional activation removes Weakened.
Mitigated by target Instinct

evidenceReferences.title: Warrior's Zeal affected Vermax Basic Attack Physical Damage
